name: fabric-rti-mcp
description: Enables AI agents to query Eventhouse with KQL, manage Eventstreams, create Activator alerts, and visualize data on Maps.

kusto_service_default_db.title: Kusto Default Database
kusto_service_default_db.description: Default database name for Kusto queries

kusto_known_services.title: Kusto Known Services
kusto_known_services.description: JSON array of preconfigured Kusto services. Example: [{"service_uri":"https://cluster1.kusto.windows.net","default_database":"DB1","description":"Prod"}]

kusto_eager_connect.title: Kusto Eager Connect
kusto_eager_connect.description: Whether to eagerly connect to the default service on startup (not recommended)

kusto_allow_unknown_services.title: Kusto Allow Unknown Services
kusto_allow_unknown_services.description: Security setting to allow connections to Kusto services not listed in KUSTO_KNOWN_SERVICES

kusto_shots_table.title: Kusto Shots Table
kusto_shots_table.description: Default shots table for kusto_get_shots when not provided as a parameter. Example: MyDatabase.ShotsTable

az_openai_embedding_endpoint.title: Azure OpenAI Embedding Endpoint
az_openai_embedding_endpoint.description: Azure OpenAI embedding endpoint for semantic search in kusto_get_shots

fabric_api_base.title: Fabric API Base URL
fabric_api_base.description: Base URL for Microsoft Fabric API

fabric_base_url.title: Fabric Base URL
fabric_base_url.description: Base URL for Microsoft Fabric web interface

fabric_rti_kusto_deeplink_style.title: Kusto Deeplink Style
fabric_rti_kusto_deeplink_style.description: Override auto-detection of Kusto deeplink style
